summary: BLOCKS 530-534 frontend testing complete. All features verified: Tab order is Collection | For Sale | Dream List | ISO | Trades (no Spin History). For Sale tab shows sales paused notice and empty state. Report/Block icons moved to beside profile photo (only on other users' profiles). Right column cleaned up with only Follow/Message, Stripe, and Golden Hive. Dream List price badges use Honey Gold rgba(255, 191, 0, 0.85) with dash '–' fallback.

context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKS 530-534 all verified via UI testing. testuser1 has 2 dream items with one valued ($45) and one placeholder (dash). testuser1 has no Stripe connected and no marketplace listings, so 'For Sale' tab shows both sales paused notice and empty state. Report/Block icons verified on katieintheafterglow's profile (other user). Tab order confirmed: Collection | For Sale | Dream List | ISO | Trades. When viewing other users with taste match, 'In Common' tab appears dynamically.
